generated_oml:
instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring rotational speed of vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisStrainSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring strain on vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisStrainDataTransmitted
]

instance StructuralElementSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring structural integrity of vehicle elements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralElementDataTransmitted
]

instance WheelSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisStrainDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisStrainSensor
]

instance StructuralElementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralElementSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational speed data from vehicle wheels"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, StateEstimator
]

instance ChassisStrainData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Strain data from vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisStrainDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance StructuralElementData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structural integrity data from vehicle elements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StructuralElementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for structural dimensions of vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling dynamic behavior of vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector, Optimizer, CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEnabler
]

instance CyberPhysicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrates physical system dynamics with computational elements for vehicle simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimator, FaultDetector, Optimizer, CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEnabler
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating vehicle state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in vehicle systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing vehicle performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for updating model parameters based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService, OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller that manages vehicle operations based on DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for simulating vehicle behavior using models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to assess vehicle safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatus, FaultDetected
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to simulate and predict physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehavior
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to improve vehicle efficiency through optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParameters
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service to control vehicle operations via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommands, TriggerIntervention
]

instance SafetyStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of vehicle safety conditions"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of system faults in the vehicle"
]

instance PredictedBehavior : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated prediction of vehicle behavior under current conditions"
]

instance OptimizedParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for improved vehicle efficiency"
]

instance ControlCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Commands sent to physical vehicle components for control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerIntervention : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human or algorithmic intervention triggered by safety or optimality violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Wheel, Chassis, StructuralElement
]

instance Wheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle wheel component"
]

instance Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle chassis structural component"
]

instance StructuralElement : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural elements of the vehicle"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs calibration algorithms to update the models of the cyber-physical system and environment with the best parameter estimates, uses the resulting data to inform monitoring systems for safety and optimal performance checks, and triggers human or algorithmic interventions for physical twin adjustments upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters based on sensor data; monitoring systems validate system safety and optimality; fault detectors and supervisory controllers are employed for error detection and correction."
]
